scripts.workspace:typecheck: pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-protocol typecheck && pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-encryption typecheck && pnpm --filter @luma/sync-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-server typecheck
scripts.workspace:test: pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-protocol test && pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-encryption test && pnpm --filter @luma/sync-server test && pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-server test
scripts.workspace:build: pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-protocol build && pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-encryption build && pnpm --filter @luma/collaboration-server build
